message:
feat(fp-frame): add Series.value_counts_bins for binned frequency counting

Adds value_counts_bins(bins) to Series, matching pd.Series.value_counts(bins=n).
Divides the numeric range into equal-width intervals using the existing
cut() function, then delegates to value_counts() for frequency counting.
Returns a Series indexed by interval labels, sorted descending by count.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
